com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Class CopyAttributesReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributesReader

  • public class CopyAttributesReader
extends java.lang.Object
    Reads attributes which are for requesting a copy from the printer.
    Since:
    API 3

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CopyAttributesReader(CopyAttributes copyAttrs)
      Constructs this object from the copy attributes provided.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup getBackgroundCleanup()
      The background clean up for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage getBookletBordersEachPage()
      The Booklet Borders Each Page for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.BookletFinishingOption getBookletFinishingOption()
      The Booklet Finishing Option for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.BookletFormat getBookletFormat()
      The Booklet Format for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.CaptureMode getCaptureMode()
      The capture mode for the copy.
      CopyAttributes.CollateMode getCollateMode()
      The collate mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.ColorMode getColorMode()
      The color mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment getContrastAdjustment()
      The contrast adjustment for the copy supported by the current printer.
      int getCopies()
      The number of copies to copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.CopyPreview getCopyPreview()
      Show a preview of the copied images supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment getDarknessAdjustment()
      The darkness adjustment for the copy supported by the current printer.

      The Erase BackBottom Margin for copy.

      The Erase FrontLeft Margin for copy.

      The Erase FrontRight Margin for copy.

      The Erase FrontTop Margin for copy.

      The Erase Margin Units for copy.

      The fold mode for copy supported by the current printer.

      The Image Shift Reduce To Fit for copy supported by the current printer.

      The Image Shift Units for copy supported by the current printer.

      The Image Shift X Back value for copy supported by the current printer.

      The Image Shift X Front value for copy supported by the current printer.

      The Image Shift Y Back value for copy supported by the current printer.

      The Image Shift Y Front value for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode getJobAssemblyMode()
      The job assembly mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode getJobExecutionMode()
      The job execution mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection getNumberUpDirection()
      Number up direction for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode getNumberUpMode()
      Number up mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.Orientation getOrientation()
      The original orientation for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.OutputBin getOutputBin()
      The output bin for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.PaperSource getPaperSource()
      The source of paper (tray) for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.PaperType getPaperType()
      The paper type for the copy supported by the current printer.

      The custom length of the paper to print supported by the current printer.
      java.lang.Float getPrintCustomWidth()
      The custom width of the paper to print supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.Duplex getPrintDuplex()
      The duplex mode for the print supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.PaperSize getPrintSize()
      The size of the paper to print supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode getProgressDialogMode()
      The progress dialog mode for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.PunchMode getPunchMode()
      The punch mode for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.ScaleMode getScaleMode()
      Reduce or enlarge the image during copying supported by the current printer.
      int getScalePercent()
      Scale percent (for manual scale mode) for the copy supported by the current printer.
      java.lang.Float getScanCustomLength()
      The custom length of the paper to scan for the copy supported by the current printer.
      java.lang.Float getScanCustomWidth()
      The custom width of the paper to scan for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.Duplex getScanDuplex()
      The duplex mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.ScanSize getScanSize()
      The size of the scanned region for the copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.ScanSource getScanSource()
      The source for the scanning supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment getSharpnessAdjustment()
      The sharpness adjustment for the copy supported by the current printer.
      java.util.Map<CopyAttributes.StampPosition,com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StampOption> getStampOption()
      The StampOption for copy supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.StapleOption getStapleOption()
      The staple mode for copy supported by the current printer.
      JobCredentialsAttributes getStoredJobCredentialsAttributes()
      The password type for stored job supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.RetentionMode getStoredJobRetentionModeOnPowerCycle()
      The retention mode for power cycle supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.RetentionMode getStoredJobRetentionModeOnRelease()
      The retention mode for release job supported by the current printer.
      java.lang.String getStoreJobFolderName()
      The folder name for the storing copy job supported by the current printer.
      java.lang.String getStoreJobName()
      The name for the storing copy job supported by the current printer.
      CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization getTextGraphicsOptimization()
      Text/graphics optimization option for the copy supported by the current printer.
      java.lang.String getWatermarkBackgroundColor()
      The Watermark BackgroundColor value for copy.
      CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern getWatermarkBackgroundPattern()
      The Watermark background pattern value for copy.
      int getWatermarkDarkness()
      The Watermark Darkness value for copy.
      java.lang.String getWatermarkFont()
      The Watermark Font value for copy.
      CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType getWatermarkMessageType()
      The Watermark message type value for copy.
      CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage getWatermarkOnlyFirstPage()
      The Watermark OnlyFirstPage value for copy.
      CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45 getWatermarkRotation45()
      The Watermark Rotation value for copy.
      java.lang.String getWatermarkText()
      The Watermark Text value for copy.
      java.lang.String getWatermarkTextColor()
      The Watermark TextColor value for copy.
      int getWatermarkTextSize()
      The Watermark TextSize value for copy.
      int getWatermarkTransparency()
      The Watermark Transparency value for copy.
      CopyAttributes.WatermarkType getWatermarkType()
      The Watermark type value for copy.

    • Constructor Detail

      • CopyAttributesReader

        public CopyAttributesReader(CopyAttributes copyAttrs)
        Constructs this object from the copy attributes provided.
        Parameters:
        copyAttrs - The copy attributes object used to construct this object.
        Since:
        API 3

    • Method Detail

      • getColorMode

        public CopyAttributes.ColorMode getColorMode()
        The color mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current color mode for copy job from CopyAttributes.Colormode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the color modes from CopyAttributes.Colormode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getOrientation

        public CopyAttributes.Orientation getOrientation()
        The original orientation for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current original orientation for copy job from CopyAttributes.Orientation.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the original orientation from CopyAttributes.Orientation.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanDuplex

        public CopyAttributes.Duplex getScanDuplex()
        The duplex mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current duplex mode for copy job from CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the duplex mode from CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanSize

        public CopyAttributes.ScanSize getScanSize()
        The size of the scanned region for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current scan size type for copy job from CopyAttributes.ScanSize.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the scan size type from CopyAttributes.ScanSize.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanCustomLength

        public java.lang.Float getScanCustomLength()
        The custom length of the paper to scan for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current scan size custom length for copy job.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanCustomWidth

        public java.lang.Float getScanCustomWidth()
        The custom width of the paper to scan for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current scan size type custom width for copy job.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanSource

        public CopyAttributes.ScanSource getScanSource()
        The source for the scanning supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current scan source for copy job CopyAttributes.ScanSize.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.ScanSize.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCopyPreview

        public CopyAttributes.CopyPreview getCopyPreview()
        Show a preview of the copied images supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected copy preview option for copy job from CopyAttributes.CopyPreview.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from {true/false}.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getBackgroundCleanup

        public CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup getBackgroundCleanup()
        The background clean up for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected background cleanup option for copy job from CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getContrastAdjustment

        public CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment getContrastAdjustment()
        The contrast adjustment for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected background cleanup option for copy job from CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getDarknessAdjustment

        public CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment getDarknessAdjustment()
        The darkness adjustment for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected darkness adjustment option for copy job from CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getSharpnessAdjustment

        public CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment getSharpnessAdjustment()
        The sharpness adjustment for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected sharpness adjustment option for copy job from CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintDuplex

        public CopyAttributes.Duplex getPrintDuplex()
        The duplex mode for the print supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected duplex mode option for copy job from CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintSize

        public CopyAttributes.PaperSize getPrintSize()
        The size of the paper to print supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected print size type for copy job from CopyAttributes.PaperSize.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.PaperSize.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintCustomLength

        public java.lang.Float getPrintCustomLength()
        The custom length of the paper to print supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected print size custom length for copy job.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [5.5, 18.0].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintCustomWidth

        public java.lang.Float getPrintCustomWidth()
        The custom width of the paper to print supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected print size custom width for copy job.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [3.86, 12.6].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCopies

        public int getCopies()
        The number of copies to copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected copies values for copy job.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [1, 9999].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCollateMode

        public CopyAttributes.CollateMode getCollateMode()
        The collate mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected collate mode for copy job from CopyAttributes.CollateMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.CollateMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPaperSource

        public CopyAttributes.PaperSource getPaperSource()
        The source of paper (tray) for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected papaer source for copy job from CopyAttributes.PaperSource.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.PaperSource.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPaperType

        public CopyAttributes.PaperType getPaperType()
        The paper type for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected paper type for copy job from CopyAttributes.PaperType.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.PaperType.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScaleMode

        public CopyAttributes.ScaleMode getScaleMode()
        Reduce or enlarge the image during copying supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected scale mode for copy job from CopyAttributes.ScaleMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.ScaleMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScalePercent

        public int getScalePercent()
        Scale percent (for manual scale mode) for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected scale percent for copy job.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from the valid range.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getTextGraphicsOptimization

        public CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization getTextGraphicsOptimization()
        Text/graphics optimization option for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected text/graphics optimization option for copy job from CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getJobAssemblyMode

        public CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode getJobAssemblyMode()
        The job assembly mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected job assembly mode option for copy job from CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getJobExecutionMode

        public CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode getJobExecutionMode()
        The job execution mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected job execution mode option for copy job from CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode.

        API 3

      • getNumberUpMode

        public CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode getNumberUpMode()
        Number up mode for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected number up mode for copy job from CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getNumberUpDirection

        public CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection getNumberUpDirection()
        Number up direction for the copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected number up direction for copy job from CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoreJobFolderName

        public java.lang.String getStoreJobFolderName()
        The folder name for the storing copy job supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected store job folder name for copy job.

        • Return can be null if the folder name is null.
        • Return can be empty if the folder name is empty.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoreJobName

        public java.lang.String getStoreJobName()
        The name for the storing copy job supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected store job name for copy.

        • Return can be null if the job name is null.
        • Return can be empty if the job name is empty.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobRetentionModeOnPowerCycle

        public CopyAttributes.RetentionMode getStoredJobRetentionModeOnPowerCycle()
        The retention mode for power cycle supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected store job retention mode on power cycle from CopyAttributes.RetentionMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.RetentionMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobRetentionModeOnRelease

        public CopyAttributes.RetentionMode getStoredJobRetentionModeOnRelease()
        The retention mode for release job supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected store job retention mode on release job from CopyAttributes.RetentionMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.RetentionMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getStoredJobCredentialsAttributes

        public JobCredentialsAttributes getStoredJobCredentialsAttributes()
        The password type for stored job supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected store job credentials type.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from JobCredentialsAttributes.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getOutputBin

        public CopyAttributes.OutputBin getOutputBin()
        The output bin for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected output bin options from CopyAttributes.OutputBin.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.OutputBin.

        Since:
        API 5

      • getProgressDialogMode

        public CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode getProgressDialogMode()
        The progress dialog mode for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        the current selected progress dialog mode from CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode.

        • Return can't be empty or null, should be either any of the values from {true/false}.

        Since:
        API 5

      • getEraseMarginUnit

        public CopyAttributes.EraseMarginUnit getEraseMarginUnit()

        The Erase Margin Units for copy.

        Returns:

        Current erase margin unit of the device.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the units from CopyAttributes.EraseMarginUnit.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackBottomMargin

        public java.lang.Float getEraseBackBottomMargin()

        The Erase BackBottom Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase BackBottom Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackLeftMargin

        public java.lang.Float getEraseBackLeftMargin()

        The Erase BackLeft Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase BackLeft Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackRightMargin

        public java.lang.Float getEraseBackRightMargin()

        The Erase BackRight Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase BackRight Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackTopMargin

        public java.lang.Float getEraseBackTopMargin()

        The Erase BackTop Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase BackTop Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

        public java.lang.Float getEraseFrontBottomMargin()

        Returns:

        Current Erase FrontBottom Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

        public java.lang.Float getEraseFrontLeftMargin()

        The Erase FrontLeft Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase FrontLeft Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseFrontRightMargin

        public java.lang.Float getEraseFrontRightMargin()

        The Erase FrontRight Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase FrontRight Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseFrontTopMargin

        public java.lang.Float getEraseFrontTopMargin()

        The Erase FrontTop Margin for copy.

        Returns:

        Current Erase FrontTop Margin of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] if getEraseMarginUnit is Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] if getEraseMarginUnit is Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getCaptureMode

        public CopyAttributes.CaptureMode getCaptureMode()

        The capture mode for the copy.

        Returns:

        Selected capture mode option available in CopyAttributes.CaptureMode list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.CaptureMode list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftReduceToFit

        public CopyAttributes.ImageShiftReduceToFit getImageShiftReduceToFit()
        The Image Shift Reduce To Fit for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected Image Shift Reduce To Fit option available in CopyAttributes.ImageShiftReduceToFit list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from {true/false}.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftUnits

        public CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits getImageShiftUnits()
        The Image Shift Units for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected Image Shift Units from CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftXFront

        public java.lang.Float getImageShiftXFront()
        The Image Shift X Front value for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected ImageShiftXFront value.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftYFront

        public java.lang.Float getImageShiftYFront()
        The Image Shift Y Front value for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected ImageShiftYFront value.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftXBack

        public java.lang.Float getImageShiftXBack()
        The Image Shift X Back value for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected ImageShiftXBack value.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftYBack

        public java.lang.Float getImageShiftYBack()
        The Image Shift Y Back value for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected ImageShiftYBack value.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getBookletBordersEachPage

        public CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage getBookletBordersEachPage()
        The Booklet Borders Each Page for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected Booklet Borders Each Page option from CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from (true/false).

        Since:
        API 6

      • getBookletFinishingOption

        public CopyAttributes.BookletFinishingOption getBookletFinishingOption()
        The Booklet Finishing Option for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected Booklet Finishing Option from CopyAttributes.BookletFinishingOption.

        • An empty value indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getBookletFormat

        public CopyAttributes.BookletFormat getBookletFormat()
        The Booklet Format for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        The current selected Booklet Format Option from CopyAttributes.BookletFormat.

        • An empty value indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStapleOption

        public CopyAttributes.StapleOption getStapleOption()
        The staple mode for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        Selected staple mode option available in CopyAttributes.StapleOption list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.StapleOption list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getPunchMode

        public CopyAttributes.PunchMode getPunchMode()
        The punch mode for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        Selected punch mode option available in CopyAttributes.PunchMode list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.PunchMode list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getFoldMode

        public CopyAttributes.FoldMode getFoldMode()
        The fold mode for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        Selected fold mode option available in CopyAttributes.FoldMode list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.FoldMode list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampOption

        public java.util.Map<CopyAttributes.StampPosition,com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StampOption> getStampOption()
        The StampOption for copy supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        Selected StampOption option available in CopyAttributes.StampPosition list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.StampPosition list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTransparency

        public int getWatermarkTransparency()

        The Watermark Transparency value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark transparency value from the device.

        • Return value ranges from [-2 to 2].

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTextSize

        public int getWatermarkTextSize()

        The Watermark TextSize value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark textSize value from the device.

        • Return value should be either any of the following predefined values like 30 point, 40 point, and 60 point.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkBackgroundColor

        public java.lang.String getWatermarkBackgroundColor()

        The Watermark BackgroundColor value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark background color value from the device.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and should be either any of the following colors like gray, cyan and magenta.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkFont

        public java.lang.String getWatermarkFont()

        The Watermark Font value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark font value from the device.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and should be either any of following fonts values like LetterGothic, AntiqueOlive, CenturySchoolbook and Garamond.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTextColor

        public java.lang.String getWatermarkTextColor()

        The Watermark TextColor value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark text color values from the device.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and should be either any of following color values like Black, Yellow, Green, Red, Blue, SkyBlue and Purple.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkOnlyFirstPage

        public CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage getWatermarkOnlyFirstPage()

        The Watermark OnlyFirstPage value for copy.

        Returns:

        Selected watermark OnlyFirstPage option.

        • Return true if watermark is needed only on first page and false if watermark is required in every page.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkDarkness

        public int getWatermarkDarkness()

        The Watermark Darkness value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark darkness value of the device.

        • Return value ranges from [1 to 5].

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkText

        public java.lang.String getWatermarkText()

        The Watermark Text value for copy.

        Returns:

        Current watermark text values from the device.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and it should have atleast a character or a string.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkRotation45

        public CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45 getWatermarkRotation45()

        The Watermark Rotation value for copy.

        Returns:

        Selected watermark rotation option.

        • Return true if watermark rotate45 is required and false if watermark rotate45 is not required.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkType

        public CopyAttributes.WatermarkType getWatermarkType()

        The Watermark type value for copy.

        Returns:

        Selected watermark type option.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and should be either any of values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkType list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkMessageType

        public CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType getWatermarkMessageType()

        The Watermark message type value for copy.

        Returns:

        Selected watermark message type option.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and should be either any of values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkBackgroundPattern

        public CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern getWatermarkBackgroundPattern()

        The Watermark background pattern value for copy.

        Returns:

        Selected watermark background pattern option.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty or null and should be either any of values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern list.

        Since:
        API 6
